[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011101001 6
1 0000111011 5
2 0111111110 8
3 1000100111 5
4 1010001010 4
5 0100100010 3
6 0100000000 1
7 1001000001 3

01 10 0100100010 3 match 5
12 21 0100000000 1 match 6
23 32 1001000001 3 match 7
34 43 0000101001 3
45 54 0000111010 4
56 65 0000100110 3
67 76 1000000010 2
70 07 1000000010 2

02 20 1101000001 4
13 31 0000100000 1
24 42 0000000001 1
35 53 0011101000 4
46 64 0000100011 3
57 75 0010001010 3
60 06 1000100011 4
71 17 0000000010 1

03 30 1001100001 4
14 41 0000100010 2
25 52 0101000100 3
36 63 1000100001 3
47 74 0000001010 2
50 05 0101110010 5
61 16 0000100010 2
72 27 1000000000 1

04 40 0000110011 4
15 51 0100100010 3 match 5
26 62 1000000101 3
37 73 1010001000 3
